mapper.select:
SELECT fch.fac_chk_hstry_no AS facChkHstryNo, fch.facility_no AS facilityNo, fch.partner_no AS partnerNo, fch.chk_dt AS chkDt, fch.chk_cn AS chkCn, fch.chk_stts_cd AS chkSttsCd, fch.chk_ty_cd AS chkTyCd,
f.FACILITY_NM AS facilityName, -- ✅ 수정 완료 m.USER_NM AS managerName
FROM FACILITY_CHECK_HSTRY fch JOIN FACILITY f ON fch.facility_no = f.facility_no JOIN MANAGER mg ON fch.partner_no = mg.mgmt_ofc_no JOIN MEMBER m ON mg.user_no = m.user_no
ORDER BY fch.chk_dt DESC

SELECT fch.fac_chk_hstry_no AS facChkHstryNo, fch.facility_no AS facilityNo, fch.partner_no AS partnerNo, fch.chk_dt AS chkDt, fch.chk_cn AS chkCn, fch.chk_stts_cd AS chkSttsCd, fch.chk_ty_cd AS chkTyCd, fch.rmk AS rmk,
f.FACILITY_NM AS facilityName, m.USER_NM AS managerName
FROM FACILITY_CHECK_HSTRY fch JOIN FACILITY f ON fch.facility_no = f.facility_no JOIN MANAGER mg ON fch.partner_no = mg.mgmt_ofc_no JOIN MEMBER m ON mg.user_no = m.user_no
WHERE fch.fac_chk_hstry_no = #{id}
